title: Another To God.
content:
Lord, do not beat me,
    Since I do sob and cry,
    And swoon away to die,
    Ere Thou dost threat me.
    Lord, do not scourge me,
    If I by lies and oaths
    Have soil'd myself or clothes,
    But rather purge me.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Another To God."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
